hero.h1: Recover the Margin You're Bleeding to the Algorithm.
hero.desc: We help retail brands selling to Amazon and Walmart recover 10–15% of lost margin through diagnostic audits and strategic recovery.

problem.title: The Algorithm Is Not Your Partner.
problem.desc: Retail algorithms like Amazon’s Net PPM are designed for one purpose: to extract maximum value from suppliers. Your margin isn't just disappearing—it's being systematically engineered away through automated markdown allowances and invisible trade spend waste.
problem.card1Desc: Our data indicates that over 40% of markdown allowances are miscalculated or applied to products with high organic velocity, effectively subsidizing growth you already owned.
problem.card2Desc: Systematic audits reveal that up to 22% of trade spend is lost to overlapping promotional windows and "auto-matched" pricing traps that trigger without human intervention.
problem.card3Desc: Retailer pricing engines prioritize their bottom line, triggering automatic price drops that force vendors into retroactive profit-protection claims they rarely win.

solution.h3Desc: Proprietary air-gapped intelligence for high-stakes financial auditing.
solution.desc: Most diagnostic tools require you to upload sensitive ERP data to the cloud, creating massive corporate risk. **IA Cero Fuga** is different.
solution.point1Desc: The audit framework runs locally. Your data never leaves your environment.
solution.point2Desc: Identifies patterns of margin extraction that human auditors consistently miss.
solution.point3Desc: Outputs exact dispute documentation pre-formatted for Amazon and Walmart portals.

expertise.desc: Our founder spent 17 years at the intersection of supply chain and digital commerce. From executive leadership at PMI to serving as an Amazon Category Leader, they’ve seen the retail machine from both sides.
expertise.quote: "In retail, what you don't measure is what the algorithm consumes. We give you back the visibility to defend your profit."

consultation.desc: Plug margin leaks with executive-level oversight. We don't just find discrepancies; we engineer a long-term defense strategy for your retail partnerships. Partner with a former Amazon Category Leader to protect your bottom line.
consultation.point1Desc: Every engagement is tailored to your specific ERP architecture and retailer agreement nuances.
consultation.point2Desc: Our diagnostic process begins with a comprehensive questionnaire to assess recovery potential before deployment.
consultation.point3Desc: Direct access to industry authorities who understand the algorithm's incentives.

proof.desc: While at Amazon, our leadership didn't just manage growth—they engineered efficiency.
proof.statDesc: Margin improvement engineered within Amazon's largest categories.

footer.desc: Precision consultancy for the algorithmic age. We plug the gaps that technology creates.
